En: As a defensive measure locking off that side of the bay.
Zh: 作为封锁海湾那一边的防御手段。

En: This means I *sorta* got into the depot door.
Zh: “这就意味着我*算是*进了补给站的大门。”

En: Dunno, pig, doesn't look like we behind a door right now -- just Cuno's 2 cents of course.
Zh: “不知道，猪头，我们现在看起来不像是在大门后面——当然了，这只是坤诺的想法。”

En: Technically -- no. It doesn't.
Zh: “从严格意义上讲——不是的。并没有。”

En: This means I *sorta* got into the depot door.
Zh: 这就意味着我*算是*进了补给站的大门。

En: He's right.
Zh: 他说得对。

En: Technically -- no. Sorry.
Zh: 从严格意义上讲——没有。很抱歉。

En: The chain trails off into the ocean, connecting the island to the supply depot on the coast.
Zh: 链条消失在大海里，连接着岛屿和海岸边的补给站。

En: (Point to it.) "This leads to the depot in Land's End."
Zh: （指过去。）“这里可以通往地之角的补给站。”

En: What for?
Zh: 为什么？

En: [Finish thought.]
Zh: [完成思维。]

En: For bringing supplies: munitions and fuel. You could also raise it, in order to lock the Western bay of Revachol.
Zh: 为了运送补给品：弹药和燃料。也可以把它抬起来，封锁瑞瓦肖西海岸。

En: The lieutenant looks at the mechanism overhead. "Ah, yes... so it seems."
Zh: 警督看着头顶的机械。“啊，是的……好像是这样。”

En: What do you think it was used for?
Zh: “你觉得它是做什么用的？”

En: For bringing munitions to the island, maybe? And supplies. You could also *lock* the bay, when you raise the chain.
Zh: “也许是为了把弹药送到岛上？还有补给品。如果把链条抬起来，还可以*封锁*海湾。”

En: Lock it from whom?
Zh: 封锁起来是为了防谁？

En: Enemies.
Zh: 敌人。

En: What kind of enemies?
Zh: 什么样的敌人？

En: Enemies of the Commune of Revachol.
Zh: 瑞瓦肖公社的敌人。

En: Of the future. Enemies of mankind.
Zh: 未来的敌人。人类的敌人。

En: Enemies of madness. Lunacy. Of the apocalypse taking place here.
Zh: 疯狂的敌人。精神失常的疯子。就在大灾难降临在这里之后。

En: Do not be too eager to greet these enemies, black hearted cavalier -- they were also the enemies of Revachol.
Zh: 不要急着迎接这些敌人，黑心骑士——他们也是瑞瓦肖的敌人。

En: Lock it from whom?
Zh: “封锁起来是为了防谁？”

En: From enemies. He looks up ahead. "Enemies of the Commune of Revachol. This seafort was a revolutionary fortification, I believe..."
Zh: “敌人”。他抬起头。“瑞瓦肖公社的敌人。我相信这座海堡是大革命时期的要塞。”

En: The boy stares at the mechanism. "Cool fucking chain."
Zh: 男孩凝视着机械。“这锁链也他妈的太酷了吧。”

En: Fuck does Cuno know? He shrugs his shoulders. "Cuno would use it to bring shit to the island."
Zh: “坤诺当然他妈的知道了。”他耸了耸肩。“坤诺要用它往岛上运狗屎。”

En: Don't think this helmet would have helped me anyway. (Look down at your wounds.)
Zh: 反正这个头盔对我也没什么大用。（低头看向你的伤口。）

En: Don't think this helmet would have helped me anyway. (Look down at your wound.)
Zh: 反正这个头盔对我也没什么大用。（低头看向你的伤口。）

En: At least my collector's impulse has been satisfied.
Zh: 至少满足了我的收集癖。

En: I'm sure I'll have a use for this armour in the future.
Zh: 我很肯定，这件盔甲以后一定用得着。

En: I never cared about collecting the full set. I'm not the collector type.
Zh: 我从没想过集齐一整套。我也不是收藏家那一挂的。

En: Hey, at least I've got this cool helmet *now*. I can wear it into the next battle.
Zh: 喂，至少我*现在*搞到这个酷炫的头盔了啊。下次上战场的时候就可以戴上。

En: It would have looked very impressive... Still. You found it all. Now your mortal coil is  *completely* protected. Few cops are this futuristic.
Zh: 看起来的确会让人印象深刻……不过你还是找齐了。现在你的尘世烦扰已经得到了*完全的*保护。很少有这么未来派的警察。

En: Indeed. You found it all. Now your mortal coil is  *completely* protected. Few cops are this futuristic.
Zh: 确实。你都找到了。现在你的尘世烦扰已经得到了*完全的*保护。很少有这么未来派的警察。

En: Future use for a future armour. Agreed. Gear up, heavy porcelain man. It's a violent world.
Zh: 未来派的盔甲当然要用在未来了。武装起来吧，你这个贵重的瓷娃娃。这可是个充满暴力的世界。

En: Yeah, sure, but you would have become nearly invincible.
Zh: 是啊，当然，你差不多会变得无敌到寂寞。

En: I'm liking the positive attitude. Keep it up, champ.
Zh: 我喜欢这种积极的态度。继续保持，冠军。

En: At least now I am truly invincible. [Leave.]
Zh: 至少现在我是真的无敌到寂寞。[离开。]

En: I'll make do. [Leave.]
Zh: 我会的。[离开。]

En: But it would have looked really impressive.
Zh: 但是看起来一定会很让人印象深刻。

En: Don't think this helmet would have helped me anyway. (Look down at your wounds.)
Zh: 反正这个头盔对我也没什么大用。（低头看向你的伤口。）

En: Don't think this helmet would have helped me anyway. (Look down at your wound.)
Zh: 反正这个头盔对我也没什么大用。（低头看向你的伤口。）

En: Can't do anything about it now.
Zh: 现在我无能为力。

En: And maybe scared the enemy combatants...
Zh: 也许还能吓唬吓唬敌方战斗人员……

En: That's a good attitude to take. I like it. Keep it up, and keep the helmet handy.
Zh: 这是个好态度。我喜欢。继续保持，善用这个头盔。

En: Exactly. But no use crying over spilt milk. Keep up the pace. Only forward.
Zh: 没错。但是事情已成定局，后悔也没用。继续保持这个步调，只要一往直前。

En: [Leave.]
Zh: [离开。]

En: Brother, you've managed to collect all the armour pieces. Too bad it's too late for the big showdown.
Zh: 兄弟，你已经集齐了所有谜题碎片。可惜已经赶不上最后对决了。

En: Son, you found another piece of the armour puzzle. Too bad it's too late for the big showdown. And also too late to collect all of them and have a full set.
Zh: 孩子，你又找到了一个谜题碎片。可惜已经赶不上最后对决了。想把它们全部集齐拼凑在一起也已经太迟了。

En: Damn. Perhaps another day. [Leave.]
Zh: 该死。也许改天吧。[离开。]

En: O glorious Falnier! You wear the full set like a true-born hero. The *ULTIMATE PERFORMANCE* of FALN flows in you.
Zh: 啊，光荣的FALN穿戴者！穿上这一整套的你，像是个地地道道的英雄。FALN的*终极性能*在你的身体里流动。

En: You are the most *Ultra* of men. Peak performance!
Zh: 你是最*终极*的男人。状态达到巅峰！

En: Go on! The fucking sunset awaits, FALN rider!
Zh: 去吧！该死的落日等待着你，FALN骑士！

En: I feel... so *dynamic*.
Zh: 我感到……充满*活力*。

En: I look so *futuristic*.
Zh: 我看起来真的特别*未来*。

En: You are Next Century personified, the synthetic man!
Zh: 你是下个世纪的化身，人造人！

En: It's like I can do anything. *ANYTHING*!
Zh: 就好像我无所不能一样。*无所不能*！

En: You are literally untouchable. A god among mere men.
Zh: 毫不夸张地说，你已经触不可及。你是人类之中的神。

En: ICM? This feels familiar somehow...
Zh: ICM？感觉好像有点熟悉……

En: Kim, what is the *ICM*?
Zh: “金，*ICM*是什么？”

En: RCM... It sounds like RCM -- Revachol Citizens Militia.
Zh: “ICM……听起来像是RCM——瑞瓦肖公民武装。”

En: A white star. (Point to the star on the label.)
Zh: “一颗白星。”（指着标签上的星星。）

En: [Finish thought.]
Zh: [完成思维。]

En: Insulindian Citizens Militia. It's the official name of the communards' army. The Black and White Army of the Revolution.
Zh: “伊苏林迪公民武装。是公社军队的官方名称。大革命时期的黑白军。”

En: Sounds an awful lot like...
Zh: 听起来非常相似……

En: It does.
Zh: “它就是。”

En: Why?
Zh: “为什么？”

En: The RCM *may* descend from the ICM.
Zh: “RCM*可能*起源于ICM。”

En: What I'm hearing is -- we descend from the glorious revolutionary army.
Zh: “我听过的版本是——我们是光荣的革命军的传承。”

En: It's a little embarrassing in '51, no? Maybe we need a re-brand?
Zh: “52年的时候是不是有点尴尬？也许我们需要起个新名字？”

En: ICM sounds like ICP. Very close to the International Collaboration Police. Nice and *normal* that way.
Zh: “ICM听起来跟ICP，也就是国际联合刑警非常接近。这样好像更好，*更正常*一些。”

En: I just want to be in a normal, right wing police force. That's all I want.
Zh: “我只想待在一个普通的右翼警察部队。仅此而已。”

En: It's impossible to say. He looks toward the darkened doorway. "It was chaos after the war. The name was good for getting people to join us -- Revachol West was mostly workers and criminals..."
Zh: “这很难说。”他望向黑洞洞的门口。“战争之后一片混乱。这个名字很适合鼓励人们加入——瑞瓦肖西边大部分都是工人和罪犯……”

En: *May*?
That's just a coincidence, officer. The CoMil was founded in '32... He bows to inspect the barrel.
Zh: “那只是个巧合，警官。国际联合刑警是在32年成立的……”他弯下腰来，检查木桶。

En: You *are* in a right wing police force. Those times are long gone... He bows to inspect the barrel.
Zh: “你*的确*待在右翼警察部队。那些时光早就已经过去了……”他弯下腰检查木桶。

En: No one remembers the ICM, the connotation is less important each year... He bows to inspect the barrel.
Zh: “没人记得ICM，内涵的重要性每年都在衰弱……”他弯下腰检查木桶。

En: There were all sorts of groups and *groupuscules* back then. It doesn't really matter... He bows to inspect the barrel.
Zh: “那时有各种各样的团体和*小派系*。其实真的不重要……”他弯下腰检查木桶。

En: ...nice *political* thoughts rush through your neocortex.
Zh: ……美好的*政治*思维从你的大脑皮层飞速掠过。

En: Just catch your breath.
Zh: 先缓口气。

En: This is better preserved than the others. You can still read the sign... He bows to inspect the barrel.
Zh: 他弯下腰检查木桶。“这个比其它的保藏的要好。还能认出上面的符号……”

En: No. He looks at it. "An *upside down* star."
Zh: “不。”他看了看。“是个*颠倒*的星星。”

En: With its horns in the sky -- the symbol of the Commune.
Zh: 朝天的鹿角——是公社的符号。

En: Are those specks stars too?
Zh: “那些斑点也是星星吗？”

En: No. That's the *uninhabited archipelago*.
Zh: “不。那是*无人居住的群岛*。”

En: A Dolorian-era symbol of Insulinde. Known as The Face In The Sea.
Zh: 是德洛莉丝时代伊苏林迪的符号。也被称作是海洋的容貌。

En: Looks old. What's it still doing here?
Zh: “看起来很古老。还留在这里做什么？”

En: After... He thinks. "Forty four years? That's not nearly enough to hide what happened here, lieutenant-yefreitor."
Zh: “大概是……”他想了想。“44年之后？根本没时间隐藏这里发生的一切，荣誉警督。”

En: After... He thinks. "Forty four years? That's not nearly enough time to hide what happened here, officer."
Zh: “在……”他想了想。“44年之后吗？根本没时间隐藏这里发生的一切，警官。”

En: One of these barrels was still leaking fuel, as you saw. The city is full of things like this. Old bullets, guns, fuel...
Zh: “你也看见了，有只桶还在漏油。这个城市到处都是这种东西。旧子弹，枪支，还有燃料……”

En: It's gonna be hard to say them. Carrying around all that weight on a busted crutch is making you pant...
Zh: 这很难说出口。用一根破拐杖承担着所有重量到处走，让你有些喘不上气来……

En: A mediocre athlete would pant from dragging around his body on a busted crutch -- but not you, you're thinking about *politics* with blood dripping down your thigh...
Zh: 一个平庸的运动员才会因为拄着破拐杖拖着身体到处走而气喘吁吁——但你不会，你考虑的是*政治*，带着鲜血顺着你的大腿滑落……

En: He leans in for a closer look. "Dunno. Maybe. Sorta looks like stars to Cuno. Or, like, islands maybe? Fuck does Cuno know..."
Zh: 他倚下身子，想看的更仔细些。“不知道。也许。坤诺看起来有点像星星。或者说，像小岛？妈的坤诺怎么知道……”

En: Cuno, what is the *ICM*?
Zh: “坤诺，*ICM*是什么？”

En: RCM... It sounds like RCM -- Revachol Citizens Militia.
Zh: “RCM……听起来像是RCM——瑞瓦肖公民武装。”

En: [Finish thought.]
Zh: [完成思维。]

En: A white star. (Point to it.)
Zh: “一颗白星。”（指着星星。）

En: Who the fuck's gonna move it? The island janitor?
Zh: “谁他妈会动它？岛上的看守吗？”

En: Looks old. What is it still doing here?
Zh: “看起来很老旧。它还在这儿做什么？”

En: Are those specks stars too?
Zh: “那些斑点也是星星吗？”

En: Is this a case for Detective Cuno? He cracks his knuckles, ready. "Idiot Cat Moon. Inside Car Motors. Is Cuno Magic? He is -- case solved."
Zh: “这是坤诺警探的案子吗？”他把手指头掰的啪啪响，一幅准备好的了样子。“ICM是‘白痴的猫与月光’，或者‘汽車发动机里面’的缩写吧。坤诺会魔法吗？答案是他会——案子破了。”

En: Shit looks upside down to Cuno. He leans to the side, tilting his head.
Zh: “坤诺觉得那狗屎看起来是颠倒的。”他靠向一边，歪起脑袋。

En: Yeah, pig. That's letter shit for you. The *alphabet*.
Zh: “是啊，猪头。你才玩那套字母什么的狗屁。*字母表*。”

En: [Finish thought.]
Zh: [完成思维。]

En: Huh, what is the ICM?
Zh: 哈？ICM是什么？

En: It sounds like RCM -- Revachol Citizens Militia.
Zh: “这念出来和RCM的发音很像——瑞瓦肖公民武装。”

En: A white star.
Zh: 一颗白星。

En: Are those specks stars too?
Zh: 那些斑点也是星星吗？

En: Insulindian Citizens Militia, the official name of the communards' army. The army of the Revolution.
Zh: 伊苏林迪公民武装。是公社军队的官方名称。大革命的军队。

En: Although it's difficult to say for sure -- the RCM *may* descend from the ICM. At some, dark point in the past...
Zh: 虽然很难确定——RCM*可能*起源于ICM。源自某个历史上的黑暗时刻……

En: Forty four years is not enough time to hide what happened here, on these islands...
Zh: 44年根本不够隐藏这些岛屿上发生的一切……

En: Looks old. What is it still doing here?
Zh: 看样子这东西有年头了，可它为什么会出现在这儿呢？

En: The *uninhabited archipelago*. A Dolorian-era symbol of Insulinde -- the Face In The Sea, as they call it.
Zh: *无人居住的群岛*。德洛莉丝时代伊苏林迪的符号——大家都叫它，海洋的容貌。

En: With its horns in the sky -- the symbol of the Commune.
Zh: 底角朝天——是公社的符号。

En: With its horns in the sky -- the symbol of the Commune.
Zh: 底角朝天——是公社的符号。

En: Thank you, Cuno. It's the Dolorian symbol of Insulinde -- the face in the sea.
Zh: 谢谢你，坤诺。这是德洛莉丝时代伊苏林迪的符号——海洋的容貌。

En: Sounds an awful lot like...
Zh: 听起来真的很相似……

En: One of the barrels from earlier was still leaking fuel. The city is full of such things.
Zh: 有只桶还在漏油。这个城市到处都是这种东西。

En: Sounds an awful lot like...
Zh: 听起来真的很相似……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: On the islet? There is almost no wind under the rain quietly falling on the reeds. Bulrushes swaying on the waterline, long dried leaves chafing against each other. The soft raindrops...
Zh: 这座小岛上吗？这里几乎没有风，雨水安静地拍打着芦苇丛。灯心草在水岸边摇晃，早已凋零的树叶互相摩擦着。多么柔软的雨滴啊……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: On the islet? There is almost no wind, just snow quietly falling on the reeds. Bulrushes swaying on the waterline, long dried leaves chafing against each other.
Zh: 这座小岛上吗？这里几乎没有风，只有雪花静静飘落在芦苇丛中。灯心草在水岸边摇晃，早已凋零的树叶互相摩擦着。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: The dry grass crackles under your feet as you stop. Far away birds' wings touch the still surface of the sea...
Zh: 你停了下来，脚下的干草发出哗啦哗啦的声响。远处鸟儿的翅膀触碰着平静的海面……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: What is that flutter?
Zh: 那边飞来飞去的是什么？

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: [Stop listening.]
Zh: [不听了。]

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: The flock of quail departs; now more than a hundred metres away... a hundred and two... a hundred and five...
Zh: 成群的鹌鹑出发了；现在已经飞到100米开外的地方……102……105……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: On the islet? There is almost no wind, just the light movement of air through the reeds. Bulrushes swaying on the waterline, long dried leaves chafing against each other.
Zh: 这座小岛上吗？这里几乎没有风，只有一丝空气在芦苇丛中流动。灯心草在水岸边摇晃，早已凋零的树叶互相摩擦着。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Underneath the flutter...
Zh: 在那个会飞的东西下面……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: The great ghost of the air is holding its breath.
Zh: 空气的幽灵屏住了它的呼吸。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Like a silent orchestra tuning -- at the beginning of some major work.
Zh: 就像在重要演出之前——默默调音的管弦乐队。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Of great importance to the few who attend.
Zh: 对于参加表演的人来说是非常重要的。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Ahead...
Zh: 前方……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: To the east...
Zh: 东边……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: To the west...
Zh: 西边……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Kim...

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: A low hum. The air slowly moves through a concrete box -- through its ancient slits and cracks. Resonating. Hollow. A big building.
Zh: 一阵低沉的嗡嗡声。空气缓缓穿过一个混凝土箱子——拂过每一道古老的细缝和裂痕，发出空洞的回声。可真是栋大建筑。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Air flows out of a pillbox window. There is very little there. The air cossets flowers on a meadow? Absolute silence. Reeds motionless. Bulrushes motionless.
Zh: 空气从一个小窗口流了出来，小到几乎可以忽略不计。轻风爱抚着草地上的花朵？周围鸦雀无声。芦苇静止了。灯心草也一动不动。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: The far away roar of the city, distant like today's dream. Before it, the sound of sand. The low tide filtered through its grains... a bird tending to its feathers.
Zh: 远处城市的轰鸣，遥远的就像今天的梦境。在那之前，是飞沙的声响。低潮滤过粗细不一的颗粒……一只鸟儿正在梳理自己的羽毛。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: A silent hiss, sea air moving through the needles of a pine tree.
Zh: 海风穿过松树的针叶，发出寂静的嘶嘶声。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Beyond that... further north...
Zh: 在另一边……更北边一点……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Raindrops fall on water, strangely quiet, forming circles in the distance...
Zh: 雨滴降落在水面上，但却出奇的安静，密密麻麻地在远处围成了一个圆圈……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Snow falls on the water, melting away without even a whisper.
Zh: 雪花飘落在水面上，寂静无声的融化成水。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Below the silence?
Zh: 而在这沉默之下的是什么？

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Col Do Ma Ma Daqua.
Zh: 哈库多玛达塔。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: A drop of rain falls on a black log. Of an extinguished camp-fire.
Zh: 大雨浇落在熄灭篝火的黑色残骸上。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: A flake of snow falls on an extinguished camp-fire. Hiss...
Zh: 一瓣雪花轻轻飘落在熄灭篝火的黑色残骸上。发出嘶嘶的声响……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: A jitter. A sound impatient to happen, but not yet in this world.
Zh: 有什么东西在晃动。一个声音急不可耐地等待着，但却仍未真正降临这个世界。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: You hear some kind of limb fidget, producing an imperceptible tick...
Zh: 你听到肢体烦躁不安的动静，发出一种极其细微的滴答声……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: We are way out now... Way out in the West.
Zh: 我们已经走远了……正在遥远的西边。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: No, it's just your imagination. You can't hear such things.
Zh: 不，这只是你的想象。你什么也没听见。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: [Open your eyes, stop listening.]
Zh: [睁开你的双眼，别听了。]

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Yes?
Zh: “什么事？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It's really fucking silent on this island.
Zh: “这座小岛还真他妈的安静啊。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It's pretty silent on this island.
Zh: “岛上还真够安静的。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Have you noticed how quiet it is?
Zh: “你有没有注意到这里有多安静？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It is -- is that why we're stopping?
Zh: “是啊——这就是我们停下来的原因吗？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: I have -- is that why we're stopping?
Zh: “我有——这就是我们停下来的原因吗？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Sorry. Let's move. [Leave.]
Zh: “抱歉，我们走吧。”[离开。]

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Mhm. Wait. I have to listen to one more thing.
Zh: “嗯。等一下。我再听听。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: The lieutenant nods, in silence.
Zh: 警督默默地点点头。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It... hurts a bit. Maybe the bandage is off?
Zh: “好像……有点疼。也许是绷带开了？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It can happen -- is that why we're stopping?
Zh: “有这个可能——这就是我们停下来的原因吗？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Momentarily the sounds are swept away. Pain shoots up your right foot and into your groin...
Zh: 刹那间，声音消失了。疼痛像一枚子弹射入你的右脚，一路钻进你的腹股沟……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: This is where a lesser man would stop to think about the pain shooting up his right leg and into his groin -- not you, you're concentrated on how...
Zh: 右脚和腹股沟传来一阵刺痛，如果是个软弱的男人，现在一定会停下脚步——但你不会，你的精神还集中在……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: No, I was listening to something.
Zh: “不，我没在听什么。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Cuno...

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: What?
Zh: “什么事？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Momentarily the sounds are swept away. Pain shoots up your right foot and into your groin...
Zh: 刹那间，声音消失了。疼痛像一枚子弹射入你的右脚，一路钻进你的腹股沟……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: This is where a lesser man would stop to think about the pain shooting up his right leg and into his groin -- not you, you're concentrated on how...
Zh: 右脚和腹股沟传来一阵刺痛，如果是个软弱的男人，现在一定会停下脚步——但你不会，你的精神还集中在……

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It's pretty silent on this island.
Zh: “岛上还真够安静的。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It's really fucking silent on this island.
Zh: “这座小岛还真他妈的安静啊。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Have you noticed how quiet it is?
Zh: “你有没有注意到这里有多安静？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: It... hurts a bit. Maybe the bandage is off?
Zh: “好像……有点疼。也许是绷带开了？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: He shrugs. "Spooky-ass island. That's how it is on spooky-ass islands. Silent and shit."
Zh: 他耸耸肩。“像个幽灵岛一样。这里就是这个狗屁样。除了安静屁都没有。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Yeah. Spooky-ass island. That's how it is on spooky-ass islands. Silent and shit.
Zh: “是啊。像个鬼幽灵岛一样。这里就是这个狗屁样。除了安静屁都没有。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Fuckin' spooky, yeah. Is what it is.
Zh: “是啊，他妈的真像有鬼一样。就是这个鬼样子。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: He squints at you. "Is that why we're stopping? So you can *bitch about the bandage*?"
Zh: 他斜视着你。“这就是我们停下来的原因？听你说些*抱怨绷带的屁话*？”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Mhm. Wait. I have to listen to one more thing.
Zh: “嗯。等一下。我再听听。”

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: Sorry. Let's move. [Leave.]
Zh: “抱歉，我们走吧。”[离开。]

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: The kid shrugs. He sniffs, audibly -- then, silence.
Zh: 孩子耸耸肩。大声吸了一下鼻子——然后，又重归沉默。

ConvTitle: SEAFORT ORB / quiet on the island
En: No, I was listening to something.
Zh: “不，我没在听什么。”

En: No-no, we're not starting with that. Not now. Not this time. This thought is over.
Zh: 不不，我们不会从那里开始的。现在不行。这次不行。这个想法到此为止。

En: A strange feeling... looking at the water. Maybe you should just wander off into the sea? Leave it all and walk in...
Zh: 看着水面……一种奇怪的感觉突然涌现。也许你应该慢慢走进大海？放下一切，就这么走进去……

En: Why?
Zh: 为什么？

En: But it's cold...
Zh: 但是很冷啊……

En: [Shake your head.]
Zh: [摇摇头。]

En: Yes -- cold and still. But love is warm, like the inside of her mouth.
Zh: 是的——冰冷而宁静。但是爱情是温暖的，就像她温热的口腔。

En: Perhaps there's someone there? Under the water. Waiting for you.
Zh: 也许那里有人？就在水下，在等待着你。

En: Where it has always been.
Zh: 它一直就在那个地方。

En: In front of the video rental on the corner. At the crossing...
Zh: 就在转角那家录像带租赁店的前面。那个十字路口……

En: Baby, you know it's going to hurt.
Zh: 宝贝，你知道会很疼的。

En: In the rain-mirror of the bay you see Martinaise, reflected. Tall edifices of ruins reach into the water, like shimmering towers. And the shacks too. Pine trees and motor lorries, upside down...
Zh: 海湾落下的细雨织成一面镜子，你看见了马丁内斯的倒影。高大的废墟泡在水里，仿佛闪闪发光的高塔。那些棚屋也是一样。还有上下颠倒的松树和货車……

En: In the snowing mirror of the bay you see Martinaise, reflected. Tall edifices of ruins reach into the water, like shimmering towers. And the shacks too. Pine trees and motor lorries, upside down...
Zh: 海湾飘落的雪花连成一面镜子，你看见了马丁内斯的倒影。高大的废墟泡在水里，仿佛闪闪发光的高塔。那些棚屋也是一样。还有上下颠倒的松树和货車……

En: In the still mirror of the bay you see Martinaise, reflected. Tall edifices of ruins reach into the water, like shimmering towers. And the shacks too. Pine trees and motor lorries, upside down...
Zh: 海湾像一面镜子，静静映照出马丁内斯。高大的废墟泡在水里，仿佛闪闪发光的高塔。那些棚屋也是一样。还有上下颠倒的松树和货車……

En: Yes, please...
Zh: 是的，拜托……

En: No-no-no-no...
Zh: 不不不……

En: Oh *fuck* yes. Go there in your head. It's been days since you've thought about her. A week...
Zh: 哈，就*他妈的*要这样。深入自己的脑海。你有好多天没有想她了。快一星期了吧……

En: Yes, yes, yes, yes.
Zh: 要的，要的，要的，要的。

En: A bottle in my hand?
Zh: 我手里有个瓶子？

En: With a bottle in your hand.
Zh: 你手里有个瓶子。

En: Always.
Zh: 总是如此。

En: Raise your sight.
Zh: 抬头遥望。

En: Islets and posts like stepping stones lead into the water in front of you. Go. Step in... it's been too long.
Zh: 面前的小岛和杆子像是深入水中的跳板。走吧。踏进去……已经过了太久。

En: Smelling of Tutti Frutti and betrayal.
Zh: 蜜饯冰淇淋，还有背叛的味道。
